truths.reflectionQuestion: What would change if you received this as God's word over you today?
truths.journalPrompt: Write a few lines about what this truth speaks into your life today.

truths.statement: You possess the Great One in you because greater is He who is in you than he who is in the world.

personalized.masculine: {name} possesses the Great One in himself because greater is He who is in {name} than he who is in the world.
personalized.feminine: {name} possesses the Great One in herself because greater is He who is in {name} than he who is in the world.

truths.verse: You, little children, are from God and have overcome them, because greater is He who is in you than he who is in the world.
truths.reflectionQuestion: What would change if you received this as God's word over you today?
truths.journalPrompt: Write a few lines about what this truth speaks into your life today.

truths.statement: You press toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God.

personalized.masculine: {name} presses toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God.
personalized.feminine: {name} presses toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God.

truths.verse: I press on toward the goal to win the prize of God’s heavenly calling in Christ Jesus.
truths.reflectionQuestion: What would change if you received this as God's word over you today?
truths.journalPrompt: Write a few lines about what this truth speaks into your life today.

truths.statement: You always triumph in Christ.

personalized.masculine: {name} always triumphs in Christ.
personalized.feminine: {name} always triumphs in Christ.

truths.verse: But thanks be to God, who always leads us triumphantly as captives in Christ and through us spreads everywhere the fragrance of the knowledge of Him.
truths.reflectionQuestion: What would change if you received this as God's word over you today?
truths.journalPrompt: Write a few lines about what this truth speaks into your life today.

truths.statement: Your life shows forth His praise.

personalized.masculine: {name}'s life shows forth His praise.
personalized.feminine: {name}'s life shows forth His praise.

truths.verse: But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for God’s own possession, to proclaim the virtues of Him who called you out of darkness into His marvelous light.
truths.reflectionQuestion: What would change if you received this as God's word over you today?
truths.journalPrompt: Write a few lines about what this truth speaks into your life today.

truths.statement: Your life is hidden with Christ in God.

personalized.masculine: {name}'s life is hidden with Christ in God.
personalized.feminine: {name}'s life is hidden with Christ in God.

truths.verse: For you died, and your life is now hidden with Christ in God.
truths.reflectionQuestion: What would change if you received this as God's word over you today?
truths.journalPrompt: Write a few lines about what this truth speaks into your life today.

struggles.label: I feel rejected
struggles.truth: In Christ you are chosen, accepted, and dearly loved.

verses.verse: For He chose us in Him before the foundation of the world to be holy and blameless in His presence. In love He predestined us for adoption as His sons through Jesus Christ, according to the good pleasure of His will, to the praise of His glorious grace, which He has freely given us in the Beloved One.
But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for God’s own possession, to proclaim the virtues of Him who called you out of darkness into His marvelous light.

struggles.reflection: Whose acceptance have you been waiting for that God has already freely given you?
struggles.prayer: Father, thank You that You chose me before the foundation of the world. Quiet the voice of rejection, and let me rest in being wanted by You. Amen.

struggles.label: I feel alone
struggles.truth: God is with you always and will never leave you.

verses.verse: Be strong and courageous; do not be afraid or terrified of them, for it is the LORD your God who goes with you; He will never leave you nor forsake you.”
Keep your lives free from the love of money and be content with what you have, for God has said: “Never will I leave you, never will I forsake you.”

struggles.reflection: How might today feel different if you walked through it aware that you are never truly alone?
struggles.prayer: Lord, when loneliness presses in, remind me that You are nearer than my own breath. Thank You that You will never leave me. Amen.

struggles.label: I am afraid
struggles.truth: God gives you not fear, but power, love, and a sound mind.

verses.verse: For God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.
Do not fear, for I am with you; do not be afraid, for I am your God. I will strengthen you; I will surely help you; I will uphold you with My righteous right hand.

struggles.reflection: What fear could you hand to God right now, trusting Him to hold what you cannot?
struggles.prayer: Father, You are my refuge. Where fear has taken root, plant Your peace. Help me trust that You are holding me. Amen.

struggles.label: I feel anxious
struggles.lie: I have to carry this by myself.
struggles.truth: God invites you to bring every anxious thought to Him and receive His peace.

verses.verse: Be anxious for nothing, but in everything, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus.
Cast all your anxiety on Him, because He cares for you.

struggles.reflection: What anxious thought could you name honestly before God instead of carrying it alone?
struggles.prayer: Father, I bring You what is racing through my mind. Teach me to cast my anxiety on You, and let Your peace guard my heart in Christ. Amen.

struggles.label: I feel like a failure
struggles.truth: God has equipped you for every good work He prepared for you.

verses.verse: being confident of this, that He who began a good work in you will carry it on to completion until the day of Christ Jesus.
For we are God’s workmanship, created in Christ Jesus to do good works, which God prepared in advance as our way of life.

struggles.reflection: What if your worth was never meant to rest on your performance, but on His love?
struggles.prayer: Lord, I lay down the weight of measuring up. Thank You that You are not finished with me, and that Your love does not depend on my success. Amen.

struggles.label: I am ashamed
struggles.truth: In Christ there is no condemnation; your shame is covered.

verses.verse: Therefore, there is now no condemnation for those who are in Christ Jesus.
Those who look to Him are radiant with joy; their faces shall never be ashamed.

struggles.reflection: What would it look like to receive the forgiveness God is already offering you?
struggles.prayer: Father, I bring my shame into Your light. Thank You that in Christ I am not condemned but covered. Lift my face toward You. Amen.

struggles.label: I feel inadequate
struggles.truth: His grace is enough; His power is made perfect in weakness.

verses.verse: But He said to me, “My grace is sufficient for you, for My power is perfected in weakness.” Therefore I will boast all the more gladly in my weaknesses, so that the power of Christ may rest on me.

struggles.reflection: Where might God want to meet you in your weakness rather than your strength?
struggles.prayer: Lord, where I feel small and unqualified, be my sufficiency. Let Your strength be perfected in my weakness. Amen.

struggles.label: I don't know my purpose.
struggles.truth: You were created on purpose for good works God prepared in advance.

verses.verse: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the LORD, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, to give you a future and a hope.
For we are God’s workmanship, created in Christ Jesus to do good works, which God prepared in advance as our way of life.

struggles.reflection: What small, faithful step could you take today, trusting God to direct your path?
struggles.prayer: Father, when my path feels unclear, remind me that You created me with intention. Lead me into the good works You have prepared. Amen.
